ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectral_data" (
  "freq_invcm" INTEGER /* Frequency in inverse centimeters */,
  "wavlen_um" REAL /* Wavelength in micrometers */,
  "path_thermal_cm" REAL /* Path thermal in centimeters */,
  "path_thermal_mum" REAL /* Path thermal in micrometers */,
  "surface_emission_cm" REAL /* Surface emission in centimeters */,
  "surface_emission_umu" REAL /* Surface emission in micrometers */,
  "surface_reflected_cm" REAL /* Surface reflected in centimeters */,
  "surface_reflected_mum" REAL /* Surface reflected in micrometers */,
  "total_radiance_cm" REAL /* Total radiance in centimeters */,
  "total_radiance_mum" REAL /* Total radiance in micrometers */,
  "integral_cm" REAL /* Integral in centimeters */,
  "total_trans" REAL /* Total transmission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating data quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freq_invcm", "wavlen_um"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectral_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead scientist, research assistant) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Researcher's affiliation (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Researcher's area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the instrumentation table */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument usage event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset collected using the instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was used */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Time when the instrument was used */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the instrument usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
